{{Missing Info}}

= Snowy Xmas =
[[File:Snowy Xmas Poster.png|200px|left|alt=Snowy Xmas]]
Dec. 20 2024 - Jan. 02 2025

'''Official News Announcement:''' https://snail-na.qcplay.com/official/news-details.html?id=110
{{Clear}}

= Relic Rewards =
* {{ImageWithLink|Bronze Longhu Cup|orange}}
* {{ImageWithLink|Xmas Wreath|green}}
* {{ImageWithLink|Candy Cane|green}}
* {{ImageWithLink|New Year Photo|green}}

= Dorm Rewards =
* {{ImageWithLink|Bank Logo|green}}
* {{ImageWithLink|Counter|blue}}
* {{ImageWithLink|ATM|purple}}
* {{ImageWithLink|Savings Counter|orange}}

= Robot Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Xmas Elf|orange|Robots}}

= Tactical Log Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Monkey King|orange}}

= Shell Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Christmas Hat|purple}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Christmas Ornaments|purple}}

= Reward Packs =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Hot Cocoa|orange}}

= Santa Peetah =
Santa Peeta visits your mailbox once a day for four days.

{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible"
!Day
!Reward
|-
|Day 1||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +10}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Artist's Palette|orange}} which includes:
* {{RewardIconWithText|Green Coating, +30|green}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Blue Coating, +30|blue}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Purple Coating, +30|purple}}
|-
|Day 2||{{RewardIconWithText|Code Monkey's Keyboard|orange}} which includes:
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Basic Data Unit, +5k}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Sim Token, +500}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Unknown Record, +2|blue}}
|-
|Day 3||{{RewardIconWithText|Gym Monkey's Backpack|orange}} which includes:
* {{RewardIconWonderFungusWithText|Purple|HP|Purple}}
* {{RewardIconWonderFungusWithText|Blue|HP|blue}}
* {{RewardIconWonderFungusWithText|Green|HP|green}}
|-
|Day 4||{{RewardIconWithText|Peetah's LU Suitcase|orange}} which includes:
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +10|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +5|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Badge, +20|orange}}
|}

[[Category:Events]]
